name: Esemdee
description:
Esemdee’s insights will blow your mind. Its analytics show you a play-by-play of why your content is flopping (or why you’re about to go viral). Designed for businesses and analysts who want to dive deep into social media trends, sentiment analysis, and competitive benchmarking, you’ll be on the pulse in no time.

Here’s why it belongs in your tech stack:

  • Custom pricing based on data needs and usage requirements
  • Get ready to go deep… data analysis, that is. Advanced analytics help illuminate social media trends and audience behavior, making your next step obvious
  • Sentiment analysis is crucial for checking your performance. With Esemdee, you can easily gauge the sentiment of social media conversations around your brand
  • Competitive benchmarking empowers you to compare your social media performance with competitors - so you know when you’re missing the mark (and when you’re understanding the assignment)
  • Monitor and post to Facebook, X, Instagram, Pinterest, LinkedIn, and more

Key Features:

✅ Advanced analytics

✅ Sentiment analysis

✅ Competitive insights
what_people_say:
What people say :

Keep an ear to the ground with Esemdee. With insights on trends, sentiment analysis, and competitive benchmarking, the platform is ideal for businesses of all sizes who want the 411 on what’s happening online.

Here’s what people say:

"Esemdee has changed the way we approach our social media data. The depth of analysis is astounding, providing insights we never thought possible.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 More user-friendly approach for beginners
  • 🚫 Simplification of data presentation
  • 🚫 Integration with marketing automation tools
